attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION)

STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.PARTY_ID, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION,
(
select ORG_INFORMATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION
minus
select ORG_INFORMATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION
) ACM
where 
 ACM.ORG_INFORMATION_ID = STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.ORG_INFORMATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_HR_ORG_INFORMATION.REFRESH_DATETIME
